task: Search for papers related to reinforcement learning under the topics of computer science and mathematics on arxiv, with recent submission dates between September 2024 and January 2025.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to arXiv advanced search, applying the requested filters for the phrase "reinforcement learning," selecting Computer Science and Mathematics, setting the submission-date range from 2024-09 to 2025-01, and sorting by submission date. The final visible URL confirms these filters: classification-computer_science=y, classification-mathematics=y, date-from_date=2024-09, date-to_date=2025-01, date-date_type=submitted_date, order=-submitted_date. The results page showed 2,275 results, and the agent provided the filtered search link plus example papers drawn from the results. Minor imperfections in commentary do not negate completion because the core search and retrieval were correctly performed and evidenced on-screen.
final_result_response:
I searched arXiv Advanced Search with:

- Query: `"reinforcement learning"` in all fields
- Subjects: Computer Science and Mathematics
- Date range: Sept 1, 2024 to Jan 31, 2025
- Date type: Submission date, most recent
- Sorted by newest submission date

Found **2,275 results**. Search link: [arXiv filtered results](https://arxiv.org/search/advanced?advanced=1&terms-0-term=%22reinforcement+learning%22&terms-0-operator=AND&terms-0-field=all&classification-computer_science=y&classification-mathematics=y&classification-physics_archives=all&classification-include_cross_list=include&date-filter_by=date_range&date-year=&date-from_date=2024-09&date-to_date=2025-01&date-date_type=submitted_date&abstracts=show&size=50&order=-submitted_date)

Top results returned include:

1. [RLS3: RL-Based Synthetic Sample Selection to Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Vision-Language Models for Indoor Autonomous Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.18880)  
   cs.CV, cs.LG, submitted Jan 30, 2025

2. [Reinforcement Learning of Flexible Policies for Symbolic Instructions with Adjustable Mapping Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.18848)  
   cs.RO, submitted Jan 30, 2025

3. [Hybrid Group Relative Policy Optimization: A Multi-Sample Approach to Enhancing Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.01652)  
   cs.LG, cs.AI, submitted Jan 30, 2025

4. [xJailbreak: Representation Space Guided Reinforcement Learning for Interpretable LLM Jailbreaking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.16727)  
   cs.CL, submitted Jan 30, 2025

5. [CHIRPs: Change-Induced Regret Proxy metrics for Lifelong Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03577)  
   cs.LG, submitted Jan 30, 2025, v1 Sep 5, 2024

Math-category examples from the same date window:

1. [Investigating the Monte-Carlo Tree Search Approach for the Job Shop Scheduling Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.17991)  
   cs.AI, math.OC, submitted Jan 29, 2025

2. [Reinforcement-learning-based Algorithms for Optimization Problems and Applications to Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06711)  
   math.OC, submitted Jan 24, 2025

3. [Classical and Deep Reinforcement Learning Inventory Control Policies for Pharmaceutical Supply Chains with Perishability and Non-Stationarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.10895)  
   cs.AI, cs.LG, math.OC, submitted Jan 18, 2025

4. [Multi-hop Upstream Anticipatory Traffic Signal Control with Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.07271)  
   cs.LG, cs.AI, math.PR, submitted Jan 16, 2025

5. [Learning-Enhanced Safeguard Control for High-Relative-Degree Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.15373)  
   cs.AI, cs.LG, math.OC, submitted Jan 25, 2025
action_history: Opening arXiv: const p0 = await openTab('https://arxiv.org/');
Searching arXiv advanced filters: await page.locator('e14').fill('"reinforcement learning"');

Searching arXiv advanced filters: await page.locator('e49').fill('2025-01');
Searching arXiv advanced filters: await page.locator('e63').click();
